parsed_review.summary: CP00-927 is an embedded HRX descriptor-only bridge pack (RP30.P04.M02.S05-RP30.P04.M03.S05, 10 units: 5 CandidatePortal tail + 5 AIReviewQueue foundation, risk A). Read-only verification confirms the pack-level claim is honest and supported. The pack claims production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false (manifest, command-evidence, construction-inspection); its asserted milestone is descriptor verification (hrx_candidate_ai_review_queue_bridge_descriptor_verified), which is fully backed. Identity/plan binding is consistent across the live closeout-pack-plan, manifest.json, review-baseline.json, contracts/hrx-people-contract.json, and HRX_CP927_PACK_BINDING; CP00-927 is the live plan cursor. Descriptor-only boundaries are enforced structurally (createHrxDomainRows forces every runtime/write/self-service/review-action/final-judgment/real-data/credential flag to false) and validated dynamically (validators.js validateHrxCp927...Coverage/Descriptor and validateHrxPeopleContract push errors on any drift), with model.test.js asserting empty error arrays against the real contract file. The most sensitive boundary, HR AI final judgment, is closed: ai_review_queue_final_judgment_allowed/hr_ai_final_judgment_executed/hr_ai_final_judgment_allowed all false and validated, and hr_ai_final_judgment plus enterprise_trust_from_local_validation are in HRX_BLOCKED_CLAIMS. No-write/no-real-data/no-runtime is credible: HRX src is purely declarative with no fs/network/child_process/exec code, and grep found no real PII, salaries, SSNs, credentials, or secrets (only descriptor field names set to false and review-question prose). Authority boundary holds: Claude read_only with promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false and references validation commands only (deterministic review/evidence, not product runtime). Changed-file-scope correctly separates the six pack implementation files from unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook docs). The pending adjudication.md / construction-inspection.json / claude-review-result.json are the expected pre-review placeholders that this review finalizes, not defects. Provenance: I did not re-execute the validation ladder (read-only constraint); command outcomes are from recorded command-evidence.json (all exit_code 0) and the readiness auth preflight, corroborated by static verification of the code paths those commands exercise. No P0-P3 findings.
